g.text: 3. Store List Reranking — sets class-level mutable state
4. Intermixing Split — splits store list at index 30
Coarse Pipeline · Same code, explicit immutable state
DVs still resolved inside existing methods (unchanged)
Full Decomposition · Single responsibility per step
31 DVs resolved once per request into RankingPipelineState
Copies ML scores onto entity data classes
Pins LCM carousels to fixed positions
Splits stores at idx 30 for carousel intermix
